chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 26 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.08.2025 For orders on MA 5999/25 For orders on MA 6000/25 For orders on MA 5781/25 Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Advocate for HESCO Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Asst. Attorney General 1. Granted. 2. Learned counsel does not press the instant miscellaneous application. Dismissed as not pressed. 3. At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed in the meeting held on 3.7.2025 whereby the case of the Petitioner has been conditionally recommended for promotion to the post of General Manager subject to withdrawal of the court case. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
